codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit `f4ae033c97c0912c03c0a0eaa9b14a2aeb696f8f` against the feature requirements and worker handoff. The implementation now rejects impossible RFC3339 calendar dates in `auth_runtime::parse_rfc3339_z`, classifies malformed impossible expiry metadata as `unknown`, and recomputes `/v0/runtime/stats` auth health from the live in-memory account state after proactive and 401-triggered refresh mutations. The targeted regressions in `auth_runtime.rs` and `proxy.rs` cover invalid leap-day/month-end inputs plus successful and failed refresh paths, and I found no remaining high-confidence correctness issues in scope.

summary: Pass. The reviewed fix closes the two reported blockers: impossible RFC3339 calendar dates no longer parse as valid expiries, and proxy runtime stats now report refreshed auth health truthfully after runtime credential mutations.
